ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., jackpot, raffle, instant) */,
  "jackpot_amount" TEXT /* Jackpot amount for the game */,
  "drawing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of drawings (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the game */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize tier */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prize tier belongs to */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the prize */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prize tier */,
  "number_of_prizes" INTEGER /* Number of prizes available in this tier */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of prize (e.g., cash, merchandise, experience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_tiers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier the prize belongs to */,
  "prize_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the prize */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the prize */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize claim (e.g., claimed, unclaimed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prizes_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize claim */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize being claimed */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the prize was claimed */,
  "winner_name" TEXT /* Name of the winner */,
  "winner_address" TEXT /* Address of the winner */,
  "winner_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_claims_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier the analytics belong to */,
  "prizes_at_start" INTEGER /* Number of prizes at the start */,
  "prizes_claimed" INTEGER /* Number of prizes claimed */,
  "prizes_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of prizes remaining */,
  "pct_prizes_remaining" TEXT /* Percentage of prizes remaining */,
  "average_claim_time" INTEGER /* Average time it takes to claim a prize in this tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_analytics_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lottery official, game administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game administrator */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the administrator is responsible for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the administrator */,
  "admin_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the administrator's term */,
  "admin_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the administrator's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_administrators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_administrators_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winner_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize claim the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, mail) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, delivered, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winner_notifications_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES prize_claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winner_payment" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize claim the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, direct deposit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winner_payment_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES prize_claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_entry" TEXT /* Details of the log entry */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the log entry (e.g., security, performance) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_drawings" (
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drawing */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the drawing belongs to */,
  "drawing_date" TEXT /* Date the drawing took place */,
  "winning_numbers" TEXT /* Winning numbers for the drawing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_drawings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the ticket belongs to */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_tickets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
